description: State document in Arabic script. Approximately 3 lines are preserved. Large fragment, huge spacing between the lines. Difficult to read more than a few words; may refer to an earlier report (khidma aslaftuhā/aslafathā). Reused for copious pen trials and writing exercises in Hebrew. There are a few scattered words in Arabic script on verso as well, possibly part of an address? The phrase in the middle appears to end with the name ʿAlī. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
